title: Creative Enterprises
description:
Are you thinking about launching a venture in the creative sector? Are you taking your first steps on the entrepreneurial path? Then this course is for you.

A creative venture requires essential entrepreneurial skills: having the knowledge and abilities needed to face the challenges of creating and sustaining a business is crucial.

That’s why, in this 3-module course, you will explore specific methodologies for developing entrepreneurial skills, understand key concepts for managing the finances of a venture, identify platforms and sources of funding for creative businesses, among other topics.

Discover the landscape of creative ventures in Latin America and the Caribbean, as well as the challenges entrepreneurs have faced, how they’ve overcome them, and how they’ve seized the opportunities that came their way.
